name: margaui
description: Tailwind 4 port of daisyui that can run completely in the browser

scripts.playground: npm run gen-vfs-dev && npm run gen-component-tree && npm run gen-theme-list
scripts.min-css: mkdir -p dist/src dist/base dist/tw dist/themes && bunx --bun esbuild --minify --outdir=dist/src src/*.css && bunx --bun esbuild --minify --outdir=dist/base base/*.css && bunx --bun esbuild --minify --outdir=dist/tw tw/*.css && bunx --bun esbuild --minify --outdir=dist/themes themes/*.css
scripts.gen-vfs: rm -rf dist && npm run min-css && cp tw/tailwindcss.css dist/tw/ && cd dist && ../tools/make_vfs_esm.py 'src/*.css' 'base/*.css' 'tw/*.css' 'tailwindcss=tw/tailwindcss.css' > ../vfs.js && cd .. && bun build --minify margaui.js > dist/margaui.min.js
scripts.dist: npm run gen-vfs && rm -r dist/src dist/base dist/tw && cp examples/*.html examples/README.md dist/

author: Mariano Guerra
